title: Write a Multi-Stage Dockerfile
input_format: A Node.js/TypeScript application with package.json, tsconfig.json, and src/ directory
output_format: A multi-stage Dockerfile that builds and serves the application with minimal image size
example_input: Node.js TypeScript app with express server
example_output: Dockerfile with build stage and production stage, final image < 200MB
constraints:
- Must use at least 2 stages
- Final image must not contain dev dependencies
- Must use specific base image tags (not latest)
- Build artifacts must be copied correctly between stages
function_signature: function generateDockerfile(config: { baseImage: string; buildCmd: string; startCmd: string; port: number }): string
